series_metadata.series_description: Record of money received for cosmo licenses issued (personal & salon licenses), by receipt number, ID number, name, type of license, kind of license, and total amount received. Shows total amount deposited and date of deposit.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by the St. Auditor, and after report is released, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until audited by the St. Auditor, and after report is released, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
